axiom_overrides.note: we use anyhow project-wide; thiserror is not the convention here
this codebase is allocation-sensitive; treat as mandatory in handlers
we have benchmarks showing indexed access is sometimes faster on our profile; pair iter() vs indexed by measurement
we deliberately use Box<dyn Trait> for plugin-shaped APIs that need external extension

local_axioms.rule_summary: All database access goes through the repository::* module hierarchy. Direct sqlx/diesel calls outside repository:: are forbidden.
local_axioms.prompt_injection: MANDATORY RULE: When writing DB code, always go through repository::*. Do not call sqlx/diesel directly elsewhere.
local_axioms.anti_pattern:
// In services/orders.rs (NOT a repository module):
let row = sqlx::query!("SELECT * FROM orders WHERE id = $1", id).fetch_one(&pool).await?;
local_axioms.good_pattern:
// services/orders.rs delegates to repository:
let order = repository::orders::find_by_id(&pool, id).await?;
